title: Loy Krathong
description: Adds a beautiful floating Krathong candle block to celebrate Thailand’s Loy Krathong festival - glowing softly over the water at night.
body:
# 🪷 Loy Krathong

> Celebrate the Thai festival of light, **Loy Krathong**, right inside Minecraft!  
> Release your floating candlelit krathongs onto the water - and let them shine under the moonlight 🌙  


![ModLoader](https://img.shields.io/badge/ModLoader-Fabric-orange?style=for-the-badge)
![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.20.1+-green?style=for-the-badge)
![LambDynamicLights](https://img.shields.io/badge/LambDynamicLights-Supported-9cf?style=for-the-badge)

[![wakatime](https://wakatime.com/badge/user/18d6afc2-0418-4101-8b22-0a0d3177adb3/project/49877d49-88e1-4149-8396-28eec5b0f0e4.svg)](https://wakatime.com/badge/user/18d6afc2-0418-4101-8b22-0a0d3177adb3/project/49877d49-88e1-4149-8396-28eec5b0f0e4)
[![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-ppekkungz.in.th-ff69b4?style=flat-square&logo=google-chrome)](https://ppekkungz.in.th)
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-PPekKunGzDev-black?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/PPekKunGz)

```
Discord Server (Request, Suggestion, Request)
> https://discord.gg/76bdQDKrqY
```
---

## ✨ Features  

- 🪷 **Floating Krathong Block**  
  - Placeable **directly on water**, just like a lily pad.  
  - Emits **soft candlelight** (level 12) and gentle **flame + smoke particles**.  
  - Perfect for ponds, rivers, or any decorative event builds.  

- 🕯️ **Realistic Lighting**  
  - Glows beautifully on water, fully compatible with shaders.  
  - Candlelight reflects gently for extra ambience.  

- 🌊 **Peaceful Aesthetic**  
  - Blends naturally with water and terrain.  
  - Fully decorative - no entities, ensuring stable performance.  

- ⚙️ **Optimized for Performance**  
  - Uses a lightweight **block-based system** (not entities).  
  - Zero lag even with dozens of krathongs floating together.  

---
